summary: Verified AI Art Director pipeline wiring. All features working: (1) Login flow works with test credentials, (2) Dashboard loads with chat interface and projects visible, (3) Visual Mode toggle (Stock/Custom) functional on homepage prompt bar, (4) Backend health check returns healthy, (5) service.js compiles without syntax errors, (6) image-prefetch.js exports correctly imported in service.js, (7) buildDesignIntelligencePrompt(designBrief) correctly injected into systemMessage at line 782-784.

design_intelligence_injection.details: Design intelligence context correctly injected into AI system prompt

creative_brief_parsing.details: Creative brief parsed from every build/edit request

login_flow.details: Login successful via Supabase Auth, dashboard loads after authentication

dashboard_load.details: Dashboard loads with projects section, prompt bar, and chat interface visible

visual_mode_toggle_homepage.details: Stock button found, toggles to Custom (amber styling) and back to Stock successfully

supervisor_status.details: nextjs_api RUNNING, frontend FATAL (expected per review request - CRA frontend unused)

7c_image_prefetch_block.details: Image prefetch logic correctly handles stock vs custom mode with designBrief parsing

design_intelligence_prompt_injection.details: prefetchedImageContext and designBrief both injected into systemMessage

critical_code_review_comments: All image-prefetch module exports correctly imported in service.js
buildDesignIntelligencePrompt(designBrief) correctly wired at line 782-784 - this was the missing piece identified in the review request
parseCreativeBrief called at line 506 to extract mood, subjects, colors, lighting, style from user message
Visual mode toggle functional on homepage (Stock/Custom)
Design intelligence context now properly injected into AI system prompt for creative direction

success_rate.backend: 100% (all syntax checks and code verification passed)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, dashboard, visual mode toggle all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Art Director pipeline fully wired and tested. Key change: buildDesignIntelligencePrompt(designBrief) now injected into systemMessage at service.js:782-784. This provides the AI with creative direction context (mood, lighting, palette, typography, spatial composition) when generating designs. Visual mode toggle works on homepage. Login uses Supabase Auth with test credentials. The frontend supervisor being FATAL is expected - only nextjs_api matters.
